name: Dashboard home page (lifetime stats + recent drives)
description: Replace the placeholder root page (web/src/app/page.tsx) with a dashboard that shows lifetime stats (total distance, total drive time, engagement %, drive count) for the primary device, a list of the most recent ~10 drives with inline trip summary (date, duration, distance, start/end address), and links to the full route list. Pulls from /v1/devices/:dongle_id/stats.
acceptance_criteria: web/src/app/page.tsx fetches /v1/devices/{dongle_id}/stats via the existing API client (web/src/lib/api.ts) and renders: a stats header card (4 large numbers) and a recent-drives section

Each recent-drive row shows date, duration (HH:MM), distance (mi or km based on a unit preference -- pick one sensible default, imperial), start_address -> end_address, and links to /routes/[dongleId]/[routeName]
Handles three states: loading (skeleton placeholders), empty (no trips yet -> friendly copy pointing at the route list), error (red banner with retry)
web/src/lib/types.ts gains DeviceStats and Trip types matching the API response shape
Multi-device support: if multiple devices exist, dashboard shows a device switcher; if one device, no switcher
pnpm --dir web lint and pnpm --dir web type-check pass
Manual check against a running backend: loads the home page, sees stats and recent drives
